host.title: Controller IP/Host
host.description: Local IP or hostname of the LNK Wi-Fi module (no http/https).

password.title: Controller Password
password.description: Rain Bird controller password set in the app.

expose.title: Expose Mode
expose.description: Expose a single Irrigation System accessory (controller) or one accessory per zone (zones).

zoneNames.title: Zone Names
zoneNames.description: Optional custom names for zones, index 0 = zone 1.

programSwitches.title: Expose Program Switches
programSwitches.description: Create HomeKit switches to trigger controller programs.

zoneSwitches.title: Expose Zone Switches
zoneSwitches.description: Create HomeKit switches for each zone when using controller mode. If Zone Valves is enabled, these are auto-pruned to avoid redundant tiles.

zoneValves.title: Expose Zone Valves
zoneValves.description: Create HomeKit valve services for each zone when using controller mode (best Apple Home visibility).

logScheduleOnStart.title: Log Schedule on Start
logScheduleOnStart.description: Fetch and log schedule data at startup (read-only).

debug.title: Verbose Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose Rain Bird request/response logging.
